programmes.show_description: In 1989, Krista Martin's life is tragically cut short because of an intruder. A friend finds her and calls 911, starting an investigation that will span four decades. S5, Ep8
Abraham Shakespeare won the lottery in 2006. Dee Dee Moore befriended him, gained control of his assets, and murdered him in 2009. S1, Ep4
During a winter storm in New York, a wife and mother is found brutally murdered in her bedroom. Detectives desperately search outside the home for clues. S3, Ep8
Emile Cilliers tries twice to murder his wife, first with a gas leak, then by sabotaging her parachutes, until her survival exposes the plot. S1, Ep1
A base jumper misjudges his launch and crash-lands on a rocky beach. S6, Ep15/20
A glider pilot's footage captures the moments after he crashed and got stuck in a tree. S6, Ep16/20
A schoolboy relives the day he was horrifically injured after falling off his BMX bike. S6, Ep17/20
A schoolgirl recalls how she saved her stepfather's life by performing CPR. S6, Ep18/20
Innovative, value-for-money products brought directly to you at home. Shop 'til you drop whilst avoiding the hustle and bustle of the High Street.
An 18-year-old sues the father of her child for return of her belongings and for filing allegedly false CPS reports. S22, Ep19
A mother of two allegedly suffers a broken nose at the hands of her sister-in-law during a heated fight. S22, Ep20
A man claims he was provoked by his landlord to retaliate online after she allegedly slandered a Nigerian immigrant. S22, Ep21
A young couple with a child saves 3K for their first apartment but claim it was dreadful; they are accused of smoking pot. S22, Ep22
A mother of two is accused of stealing her uncle's furniture after their lease-to-own agreement falls apart; she claims he took the furniture himself. S24, Ep161
A man insists that a young boy looks and acts just like him but his ex-lover says it's impossible and sues him for filing for a paternity test. S24, Ep162
A man and woman continue to live with each other 18 years after their divorce; when they finally part, the woman wants everything they shared. S24, Ep163
When a young car salesman disrespects the Judge, she advises that he take his parents out to a long lunch when the show airs. S24, Ep164
A landlord says he was conned into letting his tenants out of their lease; they sue him for the return of their security deposit. S18, Ep221
A phony smog certificate is what a woman claims a young man tried to pawn off on her when she purchased a car from him. S18, Ep222
Video evidence is called into play when a minor altercation between schoolmates escalates into a full-blown fist fight. S18, Ep223
An alleged eyewitness to a violent road rage incident claims a cyclist was screaming obscenities at a motorist; the Judge doesn't buy it. S22, Ep44
A teenager is accused of drinking, driving and fleeing the scene of an accident; he insists his car was stolen despite an eyewitness's damning testimony. S22, Ep45
A woman's chance meeting turns into lawyer's fees, alleged harassment, and a man's jail time for suspected drug charges. S22, Ep46
An ex-convict claims that while he served time his girlfriend stole from his bank account; she claims the money was spent on him. S22, Ep47
An altercation on St. Patrick's Day leads to a man allegedly spitting on a woman's car window; Judge Judy tracks down his accomplices. S22, Ep48
A dog sitter makes an ill-fated decision to visit a locale with an allegedly dangerous large dog; a bruised spine and over 7k in vet bills soon follow. S22, Ep49
A man claims he was bleeding profusely after an alleged attack by a pit bull whose owner claims it would never hurt anyone. S22, Ep50
A man openly admits he doesn't pay taxes and sues a former friend for the return of property and for allegedly filing a false police report. S24, Ep177
A wild party leaves a vacation rental in shambles after an intended group of 8 turns into a 'caught on video' gang of 30 partygoers. S24, Ep178
Even though puppies look exactly like their dog, a mother and son deny that their pet was responsible and sue neighbours for an alleged attack. S24, Ep179
Judge Judy advises a father to appeal any grievances against previous judges, as he takes on the mother of his teenager over child support. S24, Ep180
UK pharmacist Mitesh Patel murdered his wife Jessica after she uncovered his plan to flee with his male lover, using her embryos for a new life. S1, Ep6
When William Saunderson-Smith was found bludgeoned to death in 2011, police discovered cash stuffed in bags and sixty-seven different mobile phones. S1, Ep5
Single mother Margie Coffey had been missing for ten days when her frozen body is pulled from a creek. S3, Ep9
Kirsty Carver worked as a civilian employee of the Humberside Police. One night, she disappeared. Her killer would be revealed as Craig Belcher. S7, Ep1
In Chandler, Arizona in 1991, an intruder viciously sexually assaults a woman in her own home. The case goes unsolved for decades until revolutionary science connects the dots. S5, Ep9
The $4,000 bill for a behavioural camp for a troubled teenager is disputed by the boy's mother, father and stepmother. S18, Ep9
A photographer claims his ex-lover had no right to use the private pictures he took of her; she claims he's exploiting her by using them on his website. S18, Ep10
A mother is thrown out of the courtroom when she speaks up about her son's 'loan' to a female friend. S18, Ep11
A teenager accuses her father of raiding her trust fund; he accuses her of doing the same to their joint bank account. S18, Ep12
A woman admits she spanked her 9-year-old daughter during a supervised visit, but demands $5,000 from her ex-husband for filing charges. S18, Ep13
A bottle of moonshine, neglected pit bulls and domestic abuse come into play when a young woman sues her house sitting friends. S18, Ep14
A man sues his ex-girlfriend for making unauthorized debit card charges while he was serving time for theft; she wants money for housesitting. S18, Ep15
After a heated argument, a woman demands that the father of her child leave their shared home; he claims she illegally kicked him out. S18, Ep16
A teenager starts to cry after her mother defends her behaviour on the court in court; her coach is sued for causing emotional distress. S18, Ep17
A woman is accused of being irrational and violent by her former roommate; they fight over a rent, damage and a restraining order. S18, Ep18
A catfight in a nightclub parking lot ends in a collision involving three vehicles; a security officer sues for damages to his car. S18, Ep19
How does a married mother become a killer? Jennifer Reali was having an affair with Brian Hood, who Jennifer says made her shoot his wife to death in a car park. S1, Ep1
A 60-year-old woman is rescued while attempting to row across the Atlantic. S6, Ep19/20
A paraglider crash-lands in the Peak District. S6, Ep20/20
Innovative, value-for-money products brought directly to you at home. Shop 'til you drop whilst avoiding the hustle and bustle of the High Street.
A woman claims her friend lost one of her dogs and that another pet died on her couch while she was away on vacation. S22, Ep51
When a warehouse worker asks to take a few days off, he claims his boss wrongfully terminated him. S22, Ep52
A man abandons his fiancée but suggests they go on their kayaking honeymoon anyway; he is accused of stealing property when he doesn't get his way. S22, Ep53
A woman and her ex-husband argue over the unpaid title loan on a Chevy Impala after she turns in the car for missing payments. S22, Ep54
An elderly woman publicly berates her longtime rival throughout their neighbourhood; he sues her for harassment. S22, Ep55
A man insists he owes nothing to his ex-babysitter because her boyfriend allegedly stole property, and she damaged his truck. S18, Ep224
Unwed parents, with a 20 year age difference, fight over an alleged assault. S18, Ep225
A mother of two is accused of stealing her uncle's furniture after their lease-to-own agreement falls apart; she claims he took the furniture himself. S24, Ep161
A man insists that a young boy looks and acts just like him but his ex-lover says it's impossible and sues him for filing for a paternity test. S24, Ep162
A man and woman continue to live with each other 18 years after their divorce; when they finally part, the woman wants everything they shared. S24, Ep163
When a young car salesman disrespects the Judge, she advises that he take his parents out to a long lunch when the show airs. S24, Ep164
Two women are caught on video chasing a man down in his place of business after he repossessed the car they bought. S24, Ep165
A young mother confides in her landlord when things get rough with her live-in lover; he denies any illegal activity. S24, Ep166
A man and woman claim their landlord blames them for the loss of his daughter to social services; they say he then called DCS on them. S24, Ep167
After a young woman witnesses the murder of her pet chickens by a neighbour's Husky, she draws a gun and kills the animal; neighbours deny it's their dog. S24, Ep168
The Judge is not surprised when a crazy living arrangement does not work out; ex-lovers are left fighting over stolen property and tow fees. S24, Ep169
A man gives his ex-wife a car for his younger daughter; she survives a head-on collision in the vehicle but refuses to give him the insurance payout. S24, Ep170
A young father is arrested and sent to jail after allegedly breaking in to his own home; his ex-fiancée says he has serious anger issues. S18, Ep226
After being accused of hitting a fence with a lawnmower, a man claims his angry neighbour held him hostage while calling the police. S18, Ep227
A young woman accuses her ex-friends of driving her car without permission and crashing it into a ditch; they say it was her fault. S18, Ep228
Between1994 and 1996 in central Florida, after four bodies are found in a wooded area known as The Hog Trails, police realise they are chasing a serial killer. S4, Ep1
Three women go missing while vacationing in Yosemite National Park after a presumed car accident, but the search and rescue team makes a chilling discovery. S4, Ep2
For 23 days in October, 2002, a sniper terrorises the Washington DC area, shooting thirteen people and killing ten. The victims are ordinary people doing routine activities. S4, Ep4
Shane Gilmer and Laura Sugden were planning a quiet night out when a horrific ambush shattered their lives. S2, Ep9
In June 2010, taxi driver Derrick Bird went on one of the worst killing sprees in British history. He shot dead twelve people and injured many more. S2, Ep10
In East Sussex, UK, Lewis Ashdown murdered YouTuber Marc Williams after pressuring him to drink excessively. He filmed the entire attack and was and sentenced to life in prison. S1, Ep1
